check.name: EmptyLineWrappingInBlock
check.description:
Checks the presence or absence of empty lines at the top and bottom of code blocks (e.g. class, method, if, for). Configurable per block kind via tokens.

For each configured block type, topSeparator controls the empty line at the start of the block (before the first statement); bottomSeparator controls the empty line at the end (after the last statement).

Policy values: empty_line (exactly one required), empty_line_allowed (no validation), no_empty_line (forbidden).

See #5313.

property.name: bottomSeparator
property.description: Set the policy for empty lines before the closing brace.

property.name: topSeparator
property.description: Set the policy for empty lines after the opening brace.
